features.name: Tunneler
features.description: Burrow through solid rock at half speed, leaving 10ft tunnel

features.name: Lightning Breath
features.description: Recharge 5-6: 90ft line 14d10 lightning DC 19 DEX half

actions.name: Blasphemous Word
actions.description: DC 16 CON or Stunned until end of next turn

features.name: Rejuvenation
features.description: Reforms after destruction unless heart destroyed

actions.name: Sleep Breath
actions.description: 60ft cone DC 18 CON or Unconscious 10 min

features.name: Fire Breath
features.description: Recharge 5-6: 60ft line 13d6 fire DC 18 DEX half

features.name: Regeneration
features.description: Regen 20 HP at start of turn unless in sunlight/running water

features.name: Misty Escape
features.description: On 0 HP, turn to mist and fly 20ft to coffin
